feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #CoE#TAIT What functionality is available in Mobile App (Maintenance Assitant App)?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one query from customer regarding the mobile/tablet (Maintenance Assitant App):

Total time per person should be more than 24 hours in confirmation.

What drives the system to cap time confirmations at 24 hours when multiple technicians assigned per work center?

Best Regards

David

entry.title: Use of Custom CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE Not Permitted in Development System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a custom business object created via the Custom Business Object and Custom CDS View Fiori apps. A table has been generated, and I am attempting to use the corresponding CDS entity YY1_PURCHASE in my development (RAP) scenario.

However, I am getting the error:
“The use of CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE is not permitted.”

Is it possible to use such custom CDS entities created via key user tools in RAP development? Or is there any restriction in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Please let me know if this is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Adding Legacy Main Asset Number to Asset History Sheet (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Experts! I would like to ask, if it is possible to add the Legacy Main Asset Number field into the standard report (C_ASSETHISTORYSHEET) or the standard CDS view (I_AssetHistorySheetCube).

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition system, so we need a solution that allows us to enhance the standard application without accessing the backend or using traditional ABAP development. We specifically need this field to be visible and functional within the standard Asset History Sheet app.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this? I would greatly appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or alternative approaches.

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards, Daniel Fedic

entry.title: Email Template not generating in Q-System after Software Collection Import
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue with a custom Email Template in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I have created a custom template in our Development environment and moved it to the Quality system using the Export/Import Software Collections apps. While the template is visible in the "Maintain Email Templates" app in the Q-system, the emails are no longer generating for my business documents.

Could anyone point me toward which specific configuration or mapping is most commonly missed when transporting these objects via Software Collections? Is there a specific activation step required in the Q-system after the import?

Thanks in advance for your help.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Stock replication trigger behavior in SAP_COM_0447
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are evaluating the SAP_COM_0447 – Material Stock Quantity Replication scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Our requirement is to send stock updates to an external system whenever there is a stock change (e.g. goods receipt, goods issue, transfer posting).

However, based on our understanding and initial tests:

  • The service seems to work as an asynchronous replication (snapshot-based) rather than event-driven
  • After a goods movement (e.g. GR), the outbound service is not triggered immediately

    We would like to clarify:

    1. Does SAP_COM_0447 automatically trigger for every stock movement?
    2. Is there any standard way to trigger replication on stock change (event-based)?
    3. What is the recommended approach if near real-time stock updates are required?

      Any insights or project experiences would be appreciated.

      Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Serial Number obligatory material cannot be updated error in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Why do we receive the Error "Serial number obligatory material cannot be updated" When using Confirm Production Order app in S/4HANA Public Cloud


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Could master data(control cycle for WM) batch created by data migration cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear sap,

Could master data(control cycle for WM via LPK1) batch created by data migration cockpit?

I could not find the migration object in the migration cockpit. I only found 'PP-KAB - Kanban control cycle', but it seems to input the control cycle for PKMC not for LPK1.

So my question is what migration object in the migration cockpit is suitable to process batch data migration of the control cycle for WM via LPK1.

Thanks

Ying

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition error message for increase the maximum material number 18 to 40
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition   and I need clarification.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, within the mainline CBC, I am unable to complete the configuration “Define Output Format of Material Numbers” (102320).


My objective is to increase the maximum material number length from 18 to 40 characters, but an error message is displayed (see attached screenshot).

However, SAP documentation clearly states that:

“When the material number length is set, both the Material Number and Old Material Number fields are set with the same length. However, the old material number field retains the highest length ever configured. For example, if the material number length is set to 40 characters and then reduced to 18 characters, the Old Material Number field remains at 40 characters.”
(SAP Note 2696446)

Could you please investigate and help resolve this issue?

I look forward to your feedback.

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,

entry.title: Encountered a permission error while creating Fixed asset Master data in data migration
entry.content:
An authorization error occurs during the simulation step of fixed asset data migration in the Migrate Your Data app.

Error message: "You don't have authorization for company code XXXX, asset class YYYYYYYY."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1.I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2.When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3.But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

 

I also check SAP Note : 3393805 - Not authorized to use transaction VL10CUA VL10CUV 

but still not found the solution yet.

 

and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

 

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Public Cloud App Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax
entry.content: What are the steps involved in generating NL specific files in the Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax app?

entry.title: Best Practices for Mining Industry - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud project and looking for any available best practices related to the Mining industry.

I would appreciate it if you could share relevant resources, experiences, or recommendations.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: PO net amount not shown in order currency in monitor purchase order item FIORI app
entry.content:
Dear All,

Using Monitor purchase order item FIORI app, Purchase order net amount and other amounts are shown in Display currency entered as a part of selection parameter.

We need Purchase order net amount to be displayed in order currency corresponding to each PO in monitor purchase order item FIORI app

Kindly let us know is it possible

Regards

Suddy

entry.content:
How to set Default Time Zone for new users in a new system ?

entry.title: workflow for manage recurring journal entries
entry.content: need to know the process for workflow for manage recurring journal entries in public cloud

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1. I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2. When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3. But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Archive in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
HI, Dears
According to our system's license analysis, the following actions are recommended in priority order.
Could you please provide guidance on how to implement these actions or archive data in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
#Archive Data
SAP Information Lifecycle Management 

Thanks

entry.title: [S/4 HANA Public Cloud] eDocuments created for Peppol customer invoiced with other company code
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

Because Peppol is currently not cross border, only BE to BE should be sent over the Peppol network or DE to DE, not DE to BE.

In the schedule edocument jobs we setup a job to submit the e-invoices automatically, this will then also submit the invoices from DE  to BE customer A which we don't want.

How can we prevent this? 

 

Thanks.

Best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to setup automatic invoices from edocument cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have implemented KSEF and working currently manually for sending invoices downloading xml format in e document cockpit and uploading them into ksef protal.

However, now that we wanted to make it automatic into e document cockpit for incoming and outgoing invoices what could be approach and process to make it automated we are using sap 2sl landscape in public cloud

entry.title: Manage Sales Contract Version 2 app - Custom Field
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have added a new custom field in the Manage Sales Contract – Version 2 app; however, I am unable to find an option to make the field non‑editable. Could you please assist me in setting this field to read‑only?
